eas_text: A civil authority has issued A SHELTER IN PLACE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Dodge, WI; at 6:33 PM on JUN 14, 2026 Effective until 2:33 AM JUN 15, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: DUE TO AN ONGOING ACTIVE LAW ENFORCEMENT SCENE SHELTER IN PLACE, DO NOT APPROACH SHELTER IN PLACE
